zh.lifeSummary: Sir Norman Darcy I of Nocton於大約1236年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾諾可頓。他和Julia D'arcy至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1294年1月6日在他的家鄉享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: Darcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Brendan, Eamonn, Maeve, Malachy, Niamh, Seamus.  French Gisele, Julien, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Clemence, Dominique, Emile, Gilles, Jean-Paul, Laure.
English (Lancashire) and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Arcy in Manche, France, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’.

Irish: in Ireland, this is generally the Norman name (see 1 above), established in Meath by Sir William D'Arcy in the 1360s, but it was also adopted for Ó Dorchaidhe ‘descendant of the dark one’, from dorcha ‘dark, gloomy’, a Connacht name that fell together with the Norman surname, which was introduced by Sir William D'Arcy and Sir John D'Arcy, Chief Justiciar of Ireland in the 14th century.

variants.name: Darcey
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and Irish (Tipperary): variant of   Darcy  .

nameMeanings.name: Norman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, from nord ‘north’ + man ‘man’, i.e. ‘Norseman’. This name was in use in England before the Conquest, and was reinforced by its use among the Norman invaders themselves. The Normans were the inhabitants of Normandy in northern France, whose name is a reference to the Vikings who took control of the region in the 9th century. In the 11th and 12th centuries they achieved remarkable conquests, including not only Britain but also Sicily, southern Italy, and Antioch. In the Scottish Highlands it is used as the Anglicized equivalent of Tormod .

en.lifeSummary: Sir Norman Darcy I of Nocton was born about 1236, in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Julia D'arcy. He died on 6 January 1294, in his hometown, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Norman Darcy I of Nocton est né environ 1236, à Nocton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec Julia D'arcy. Il est décédé le 6 janvier 1294, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Norman Darcy I of Nocton wurde um 1236 in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hatte mit Julia D'arcy mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Januar 1294 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Norman Darcy I of Nocton è nato il circa 1236 nel Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con Julia D'arcy. Morì il 6 gennaio 1294, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Norman Darcy I of Noctonは約1236年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアノクトンで生まれた。彼はJulia D'arcyとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1294年1月6日に故郷で59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Norman Darcy I of Nocton(은)는 대략 1236년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 노크턴에서 태어났다. 그는 Julia D'arcy(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1294년 1월 6일 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Norman Darcy I of Nocton nasceu aproximadamente 1236, em Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas com Julia D'arcy. Ele faleceu em 6 de janeiro de 1294, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Norman Darcy I of Nocton родился около 1236 г. в местности ноктон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от Julia D'arcy. Он умер 6 января 1294 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет.
